feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Email Triggering for Maintenace Notification in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have a requirement for email triggering functionality to work center responsible person whenever a maintenance notification is created. 

can this be achieved in standard?

Thanks!

entry.title: GOS icon dosent appear in T-code iw32 or iw22
entry.content: Hi expert i cant see the GOS icons in my work orders or notification. i dont know what else i have to do make it appear

entry.title: How to get MTBF, MTTR reports in SAP Public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Greetings!!
We are using S/4 Hana Public cloud; we are checking for the MTBF and MTTR reports. Could you please help us know which applications helps here to get the reports and any pre-configuration required for the report to be generated. If any pre-settings need to be maintained in the application and data availability in the system and what are all the filters to be maintained?
Could you please mention us a detailed process of getting the MTBF and MTTR reports.

Regards,
Yaswanth.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

SAP Asset Performance Management 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management

entry.title: Purchase requisition for maintenance order not visible in Fiori APP
entry.content:
Hi,

We are presenting best practices for the PM module to a client that is implementing S/4HANA Cloud Private. We are following the test script posted in the Process Navigator for the BH1 business process "Corrective Maintenance." When we add a non-stock item material and the services, the purchase requisitions are created as shown in the following image:

However, in the step where we need to convert the purchase requisition to a purchase order in the Fiori application "Process Purchase Requisitions - Formerly Manage Purchase Requisitions," the purchase requisition number is not available in the list.

impleme

The user has all the roles described in the test script, and the maintenance order is released, but we don't know why we cannot convert the PR to a PO.

If anyone knows why this is happening, it would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance and best regards!

entry.title: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
entry.content:
Hello experts,

has anyone in this community ever implemented This API? I kindly ask for your assistance.

API: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002/overview

I want to create a material BOM without items but i couldn't do it, I have some error with my json body, fields are missing. I have looked at the documentation, specifically at the suggested JSON in the API Reference but I wasn't able to understand what is missing.

URL Request: (...)/sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV;v=0002/MaterialBOM

HTTP Method: Post

Request body - JSON:

{
    "BillOfMaterialVariantUsage": "1",
    "IsMultipleBOMAlt": false,
    "BillOfMaterialAuthsnGrp": "",
    "IsConfiguredMaterial": true,
    "BOMTechnicalType": "M",
    "BOMGroup": "",
    "BillOfMaterialStatus": "1",
    "IsMarkedForDeletion": false,
    "IsALE": false,
    "BOMHeaderBaseUnit": "PC",
    "BOMHeaderQuantityInBaseUnit": "2",
    "DocumentIsCreatedByCAD": false,
    "ProductDescription": "Super Bike",
    "PlantName": ""
}

Status: 400 Bad Request

Error details:

{
    "errordetails": [
        {
            "ContentID": "",
            "code": "29/853",
            "message": "Data is incomplete",
            "propertyref": "",
            "severity": "error",
            "transition": true,
            "target": ""
        }
    ]
}

 

Thank you,

Best Regards,

João Vieira

entry.title: SAP ECC how to delete all the components in mass for a list of routing ?
entry.content:
Hello,

still working in SAP ECC EHP6, I have a list of routings ( SAP PM transaction IA05 ) with components. I want to delete all the components of these routings ? Is there any way to do this ? 

Thanks 

Best regards

entry.title: Material list is empty in report malfunction
entry.content:
hello everyone 

I facing problem while trying to reserve spare part in report malfunction FIORI app material list does not appear any details for Material coeds , description 

FIORI APP ID = F2023

FIORI APP Name = report and repair malfunction

entry.title: Maintenance Plan Call Scheduling type/status
entry.content:
Hello Expert

How to get the Maintenance Plan Call Scheduling type/status using table logic ? I want to develop a report which will give me next due maintenance call against the maintenance plan along with scheduling type/status, Maintenance order generated against it. Let me know if the FM is available to get the information.

Please guide 

Regards 

Makarand Gurjar

entry.title: Maintenance Plan calls & their status
entry.content:
Hello All 

I want to develop report which will give me maintenance plan information along with their call list and status of call list. I am not getting information from MPLA, MHIO, MHIS MMPT table regarding Maintenance call schedule type/status from the table. How to get the information? is there any standard FM available which will give the status of maintenance call by passing call number along with maintenance plan number?

Regards

Makarand

entry.title: Seasonal Maintenance strategy
entry.content:
Hello,

I have this requirement to have a monthly call from the maintenace plan from May till October and a 3 monthly call from November till June. 

Is it possible to achieve this by using the SAP maintenance strategies?

Could someone please help me on this?

Many thanks,

Regards,

Ilyas

entry.title: How to do authorization check for personnel no (PERNR) in PM order confirmation
entry.content:
Hi SAP PM Guru, 

Business requires to add personnel no check during order confirmation to ensure only authorized personnel is allowed to do confirmation.

There are 2 options:

1. Personnel no. is specified in work center capacity. 

2. Personnel no. is linked to HR infotype 1001 (relationship) for qualification control. 

For either of the above mentioned, is there any authorization object which can be added in confirmation?

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: Why is the message ME046 not being set to Error in transaction codes IW31?(In release pros.)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In transaction codes IW31 and IW32 for external repairs PM02-PM03, the system checks the Purchasing view by default and displays the message shown in Image 1, which means the message ME046 is set to Warning.

Actions I have taken: In transaction code SM30, I have set tables T100S and T160M for ME046 to Error, and it is also specified in transaction code OMAS as shown in Image 2. However, in transaction codes IW31-32, the same message is still active as a Warning.

Any help and suggestions are welcome. Additionally, I have an issue with adding ME046 in transaction code OMCQ, and I am not sure if it is related to my problem.
I don't need ABAP programming. I know about IWO0009 and understand it can be done from there, but I just want it to be possible with Message configuration.

entry.title: And indicator or report can show the confirmation9IW41) was processed by DP90
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Is there any way to check what all hours are processed by DP90?

EG: 1st DP90 process 10 hours of service order Then I confirm 15 hours in service order So is there any indicator that 10 hours are billed and 15 hours are not billed?

entry.title: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usage Count
entry.content:
I have an end user that would like to setup a Maintenance Plan to be triggered once a specific equipment is used 6 times.

I setup a Measurement Point as a Counter with a Unit of Measure of each. (I was testing different Annal Estimtate values.)

And assigned it to a Maintenance Plan like this.

I then entered 6 counters (counting up by 1 each time) until I got to 6. Running Deadline Monitoring on each entry of a usage counter did not trigger a Work Order.

Any suggestions on how I can get the Maintenance Plan to create a Work Order based on a usage of multiples of 6 times?

Here is a screenshot of the Measurement Documents entered.

And IP10 after running Deadline Monitoring.

entry.title: Transferring Measurement Document attachment to Notification
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAPiens:), 

I am currently working on the enhancement where the Plant Maintenance Notification is triggered when the Measurement Reading inside the Measurement Document (MD)is below the target reading in the Measurement Point (MP) by using User EXIT IMRC0001. This is supposed to happen when the MD is saved. This is all fine.

Another requirement is when the MD is saved the attachment inside the MD must also get transferred to the Notification 

How do I achieve this? Could anyone please provide me the details?

Regards

Deepak Doddagoudar

entry.title: Counter Base Strategy Maintenance Plan
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Can we generate multiple Notification based on the Maintenance Package thru standard SAP?

For Ex: 

1.2000 Hours maintenance - Plan should generate 1 Notification, generated Order thru Notification will contain operations of 2000 Milestones.

2.4000 Hours Maintenance - Plan should generate 2 Notification (2000,4000), generated Order thru Notification will contain operations of 2000 and 400Milestones.

3.8000 Hours Maintenance - Plan should generate 3 Notification (2000,4000,8000), generated Order thru Notification will contain operations of 2000, 4000, 8000Milestones.

Or any Exit available to fulfill this requirement.

Please Help Me.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management 

SAP Asset Strategy and Performance Management

entry.title: RESB-GPREIS decimal places at runtime while creating work order
entry.content:
When you use currency  as KRW( which is configure with no decimal point in OY04).

When we enter the purchasing data in Components and enter the price as 123 and try to save, RESB_BT table gets the data as 1.23 via standard code. The same runtime values are used further in enhancement. Why does sap give 1.23(incorrect) as it should give value as 123

entry.title: Sapnote1644457 - Default item category for components in maintenance and service orders not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have set the "Define Default Values for Component Item Categories" in customizing to :

Mat.type = ERSA and Plant to right Plant code.

But still when we add a component to the workorder with that plant code and type ERSA , Still SAP gives an error "Enter an item Category". There is also no user exit used at the moment.

Sap Note : 1644457 - Default item category for components in maintenance and service orders - SAP for Me is already checked of course.

We are on ECC 617 SP26

 

greetings Rob

entry.title: Tcode with WO, PO and Vendor
entry.content:
Hello, all!

Do you know any Tcode with WO, PO and Vendor in the same report in PM?

I need this ASAP, so, any feedback is appreciated!

Thank you so much!

entry.title: Differences of PM functionality on ECC & S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I am still working in SAP ECC version . Can anyone please through some light on the differences between ECC & S4 Hana from PM module aspect ?

Thanking you very much .

Best Regards 

Mohammed
